query:
SELECT q.id, q.quotationNumber, q.status, q.total, c.name as clientName, c.userId 
FROM quotations q 
JOIN clients c ON q.clientId = c.id 
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Alvaro%' OR c.name LIKE '%Pruebas%'
ORDER BY q.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT q.id, q.quotationNumber, q.status, q.total, c.name as clientName, c.userId 
FROM quotations q 
JOIN clients c ON q.clientId = c.id 
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Alvaro%' OR c.name LIKE '%Pruebas%'
ORDER BY q.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
